rationale: Completeness is the dual of soundness (0014); stating it requires the semantic-consequence relation in Gamma |= phi, which is def:log-consequence. The current empty set omits this load-bearing stating-dependency. The provability side (Gamma |- phi) has no node, so it cannot be attached.
notes: Missing-vocabulary observation: provability/derivability (|-) has no node in index.json (searches for 'provable'/'derivation' return only soundness/completeness) -- candidate for authoring, and the same gap is present (unflagged) in def:fol-soundness (0014). Parity caveat: if the reviewer keeps def:fol-satisfaction as a direct dep of the dual soundness node, mirror it here so the dual pair stays symmetric.
